CVE-2024-42845.title: An eval Injection vulnerability in the component invesalius/reade ...
CVE-2024-42845.description: An eval Injection vulnerability in the component invesalius/reader/dicom.py of InVesalius 3.1.99991 through 3.1.99998 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via loading a crafted DICOM file.

CVE-2024-44825.title: Directory Traversal vulnerability in Centro de Tecnologia da Info ...
CVE-2024-44825.description: Directory Traversal vulnerability in Centro de Tecnologia da Informaco Renato Archer InVesalius3 v3.1.99995 allows attackers to write arbitrary files unto the system via a crafted .inv3 file.
